scripts.demo:tools: node -e "(async()=>{const {startServer}=require('./dist/src/http/server');const r=await startServer({port:0});const base='http://127.0.0.1:'+r.port;const res=await fetch(base+'/tools');console.log(await res.text());await r.close();})().catch(e=>{console.error(e);process.exit(1);});"
scripts.demo:capabilities: node -e "(async()=>{const {startServer}=require('./dist/src/http/server');const r=await startServer({port:0});const base='http://127.0.0.1:'+r.port;const res=await fetch(base+'/agent/capabilities');console.log(await res.text());await r.close();})().catch(e=>{console.error(e);process.exit(1);});"
scripts.demo:agent:llm-mock: node -e "(async()=>{const {startServer}=require('./dist/src/http/server');const r=await startServer({port:0});const base='http://127.0.0.1:'+r.port;const body={goal:'sum 2 3',demo:'core',mode:'mock',planner:'llm-mock',maxSteps:12,traceId:'demo-llm-mock-001'};const res=await fetch(base+'/agent/run',{method:'POST',headers:{'content-type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify(body)});console.log(await res.text());await r.close();})().catch(e=>{console.error(e);process.exit(1);});"
scripts.demo:agent:llm-live: node -e "(async()=>{const {startServer}=require('./dist/src/http/server');const r=await startServer({port:0});const base='http://127.0.0.1:'+r.port;const body={goal:'sum 2 3',demo:'core',mode:'mock',planner:'llm-live',llmProvider:'mock',maxSteps:12,traceId:'demo-llm-live-001'};const res=await fetch(base+'/agent/run',{method:'POST',headers:{'content-type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify(body)});console.log(await res.text());await r.close();})().catch(e=>{console.error(e);process.exit(1);});"
